c.d: Total number of active monthly users on the platform, indicating market reach and potential buyer pool
c.s: App analytics platforms, company reports, market research data

c.d: Percentage of sale price or fixed fees charged by the platform, affecting seller profitability
c.s: Platform terms of service, fee schedules, seller documentation

c.d: Platform's focus on specific item categories versus general marketplace approach
c.s: Platform marketing materials, category listings, feature analysis

c.d: Sophistication of photo editing, description templates, pricing suggestions, and listing management features
c.s: App feature analysis, user interface review, seller tool assessment

c.d: Built-in payment protection, escrow services, and dispute resolution mechanisms available to sellers
c.s: Platform security features, payment processing documentation, user protection policies
